productDisplayName: Baggit Women Temptation Moly Red Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 16 cm Crafted from leatherette A buttonable flap with one pocket and six card holders Three pockets and a zippered pocket, an id holder adhered to it and six card holders Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
